title: Finn's Workshop
body:
![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/4uTekNo.png)
# About:
Elegant model desings for swords, tools and other utility items!\
Axe, pickaxe, hoe and shovel have 3D models! Not extruded textures like models.
#

# Mod Support:
Finn's Workshop has an addon with mod support! All still incomplete, but include most common tools and textures from Gregtech CE and Gregtech CEU!
# 


[Still Working on Page]
